name: Block Action
desc: Triggers a block action animation/event (chest open, piston extend, note block play, etc.).
notes: Block actions: chest open/close, piston extend/retract, note block note, door open, dispenser click, etc.

implementation.overview: S24 triggers block action animations — chest open/close sounds and particles, piston extension, note block sounds. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S24. ChestStealer modules could read chest open actions for timing, but no source code found uses this approach.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S24PacketBlockAction)
modules.purpose: Server sends S24PacketBlockAction to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
